sections.paragraph:
pl. מֻשְׁמָרֹות, f. of the preceding.

(1) custody, guard.-(a) the act of guarding, 2Ki 11:5, 2Ki 11:6.-(b) a place where guards are set, a station, Isa 21:8 Hab 2:1 also used of the guards or watchmen themselves, Neh 7:3 12:9 13:30 .-(c) that which is guarded, 1Sa 22:23.

(2) a keeping, Exo 12:6 16:32 , 33 Exo 16:33, 34 Exo 16:34.

(3) observance, or performance of an office or function, Num 4:27, 31 , זאֹת מִשְׁמֶרֶת מַשָּׂאָם “this is the observance of their porterage,” these things are for them to carry; Num 3:31, מִשְׁמַרְתָּם הָאָרֹון “their office (was) the ark.” Hence שָׁמַר מִשְׁמֶרֶת הַמִּשְׁכָּן Num 1:53 31:30 , 47 Num 31:47, or הַקֹּדֶשׁ 3:28 32:38 , or יְהֹוָה Levit. 8:35 , to do service in the holy tabernacle.

(4) that which is observed, a law, a rite, Gen 26:5 Lev 18:30 22:9 Deu 11:1 Jos 22:3 1Ki 2:3 2Ch 13:11 23:6 Zec 3:7 Mal 3:14. Farther-

(5) שָׁמַר מִשְׁמֶרֶת פּ׳ to keep on any one’s side, i.e. continually to follow his party, 1Ch 12:29, מַרְבִּיתָם שֹׁמְרִים מִשְׁמֶרֶת בֵּית שָׁאוּל. Vulg. magna pars eorum adhuc sequebatur domum Saul.
